title: Raw sequencing data for "Quantifying XNA replication fidelity using nanopore sequencing"
author: Kaplan, Nicholas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This file contains the raw nanopore sequencing data (pod5) for the manuscript "Quantifying XNA replication fidelity using nanopore sequencing". This represents approximately 10% of the total data. Full datasets are available upon request from the corresponding author. Data is divided into two categories: PCR data and model training/testing data. Raw pod5 sequencing files are included for each sequencing run, along with reference FASTA files, barcode information for demultiplexing, and other relevant metadata for each experiment. All sequencing runs were generated using ONT Flongle flow cells (R10.4.1 chemistry). A key is included with this submission (Zenodo-Key.xlsx), containing a sheet for each data category. CSV versions of this key are also included inside the relevant directories of the compressed file.
